title: Combine sub-items of items with the same name
excerpt: I would like items with the same name combine into 1 item and have the subitems merge. Is this possible?

posts.author: JChum (Jay Chumley)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like items with the same name combine into 1 item and have the subitems merge. Is this possible?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jay!

Charlotte here from the monday team! Do you have the CRM product? I ask because on our monday sales CRM product, we have a feature for managing duplicates. You can learn more about it here.

Otherwise, there is no way to automatically combine subitems or items with subitems or items with the same name, unfortunately.

You would have to use the search bar tool to manually find and combine items.

However, there are a couple of apps in our apps marketplace that can help with this!

Screen Shot 2023-11-16 at 4.35.29 PM1354×354 31.4 KB

Check out the Data Clean one here and the Duplicates & Uniques one here.

I hope this is helpful!
